# Kahramana Baghdad — Authentic Iraqi Restaurant in Bahrain

Kahramana Baghdad is a premier Iraqi restaurant in the Kingdom of Bahrain, serving authentic Baghdadi cuisine including Masgouf, charcoal grills, and traditional breakfast.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://kahramanat.com
- Telephone: +973 1713 1413
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kahramanat_b

## Branches
- Riffa: Al-Hijiyat Area
- Qallali: Main Street
- Al-Badi': Coming Soon

## Menu Highlights
- Authentic Iraqi Masgouf (Grilled Carp)
- Traditional Iraqi Breakfast
- Charcoal Grills and Quzi
- Iraqi Shawarma and Dolma

## Metadata
- Cuisine: Iraqi / Baghdadi / Middle Eastern
- Price Range: $$
- Languages: Arabic (Primary), English
